title: All Items (Server Mod)
description: Track a groups collective progress for an all items challenge
body:
# All Items Server Mod

This mod allows you to keep track of the items you and your friends have collected in your minecraft worlds. It is a spin off of my all items plugin which has a lot more features and better implementation. 

This mod is meant to keep track of your collective progress of collecting all the items in the game. There is also the client side fabric/neoforge mod which allows you to have a personal list of items to track throughout your world.

Link to client mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/all-items-(fabric)

Link to spigot plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/all-items

# Config

The list of items for you to collect is customizable and compatible with other mods. The default list is just items obtainable in vanilla minecraft but you can add or remove items to get exactly what you want. You can do this per world or change the default list to have a standard item list when loading a new world.

You can find it under configs/AllItems

# Keybinds

Default key is B to open the menu, and keep in mind the list also updates when B is clicked, so any item not in your inventory won't be added.

# Other Mods

This mod allows you to use items from other mods! By modifying the config you can just add <modid>:<item_name> to a row and get that item in your inventory.

![OtherModMenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db0250661143d6f04296a43f689fe687105589c7.png)

# Filter Items

By clicking the hopper you send your collected items to the bottom of the list, allowing you to more clearly identify which items you have left to collect.

# Leaderboard

Hover over the hanging sign to see the servers top 3 players.

# Discord

Join the discord!
Link: https://discord.gg/zHzFgWX8KW
